title: gardenia subcarinata var. subcarinata
intro: Gardenia subcarinata var. subcarinata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Madagascar and other parts of the Indian Ocean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gardenia subcarinata var. subcarinata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against infections, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine.
